nodes.label: The core problem this session fixed
nodes.norm_label: the core problem this session fixed

nodes.label: posix_fadvise DONTNEED page cache eviction
nodes.rationale: blosc2 buffered I/O caches .b2nd disk blocks in cgroup_file; closing handles does not evict pages; POSIX_FADV_DONTNEED after close is the sound fix vs O_DIRECT

nodes.label: MAE default num_workers=0
nodes.rationale: DataLoader IPC via memfd_create leaks cgroup_shmem ~1.5 GB/epoch; MAE CPU work is trivial vs H200 forward so nw=0 stays within 20% speed budget

nodes.label: MAE cgroup OOM fix plan v2 (TMPDIR)
nodes.norm_label: mae cgroup oom fix plan v2 (tmpdir)

nodes.label: checkpoint temp files on tmpfs shmem leak
nodes.rationale: Lightning checkpoint saves stage ~779 MB zip-pickle temps in TMPDIR=/tmp tmpfs; interrupted runs leave unreclaimable cgroup_shmem; primary OOM killer not page cache
nodes.norm_label: checkpoint temp files on tmpfs shmem leak

nodes.label: cgroup_scope honest diagnostics
nodes.rationale: interactive node root cgroup reports node-wide memory noise not training PID; abort mem-diag on root unless NANOUNET_ALLOW_ROOT_CGROUP=1

nodes.label: nanochat-style coding philosophy
nodes.rationale: one file one concept, dataclass config, no ABCs/registries, assert invariants, Lightning only where needed, under 200 LOC per file

nodes.label: encoder-only MAE weight transfer
nodes.rationale: discard SSL decoder; load encoder only per Wald CVPR 2025 and OpenMind 2025; stem CT channel copied zero-init +2 prompt channels

nodes.label: MAE fine-tune LR 1e-3 default recommendation
nodes.rationale: CVPR 2025 Tab 3: peak 1e-3 beats 1e-2 when starting from MAE; never freeze encoder

nodes.label: zero nnunetv2 runtime imports goal
nodes.rationale: port semantics not structure from nnUNet-v2-pro; keep on-disk layout byte-compatible for interchange

nodes.label: checkpoint staging tmpfs cgroup_shmem leak
nodes.rationale: Lightning atomic save writes ~779 MB temp on tmpfs; orphaned PK zip-pickle files pin RAM unreclaimable under cgroup limit

nodes.label: Blosc2 page cache cgroup_file growth
nodes.rationale: random patch I/O fills kernel page cache; fadvise after close mitigates; reclaimable under Slurm unlike tmpfs shmem

nodes.label: MIN_SPREAD_MM collinear click guard
nodes.rationale: collinear landmarks can yield spurious 180 deg rotation; fall back to median translation when spread[1] < 50 mm

nodes.label: body-mask metric + VOI per-lesion refine plan
nodes.norm_label: body-mask metric + voi per-lesion refine plan

nodes.label: elastix GeometricalCenter transform init
nodes.rationale: disjoint world frames cause zero valid voxels without bulk pre-alignment; AutomaticTransformInitialization on rigid map unlocks non-overlapping pairs

nodes.label: longitudinal cross-sectional collapse
nodes.rationale: naive concat from scratch scores 54.0 vs 55.8 single-TP; net ignores baseline without DWB or synthetic pretrain per LongiSeg ablation

nodes.label: stamping baseline collage rejected
nodes.rationale: composite seams are OOD for shared encoder; real warped CT required for clustered multi-lesion alignment
